response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the song through the lyrics snippet 'Mentari terbenam temani dalam kesendirianku' as 'Pasti Bisa' by Citra Scholastika. 2. Performed a search to confirm the song details and retrieve the full lyrics. 3. Divided the video into 3 distinct scenes based on audio and visual transitions (performance, dialogue/no-music, resumed music with city scenery). 4. Mapped the scenes to the appropriate timestamps and populated the JSON schema with identified metadata and retrieved lyrics.
response.global_summary: A video featuring an anime-style band performance, an escape room narrative featuring a 3D avatar, and a subsequent urban walk, all set to the song 'Pasti Bisa' by Citra Scholastika.

scenes.description: An anime-style band performs the song 'Pasti Bisa'.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Mentari terbenam temani dalam kesendirianku
Temani aku dalam kepedihan ini
Ku bertahan
Mentari terbenam beri semangat baru tuk jiwaku
Beri kicauan merdu tuk hidupku ini
Ku bertahan

Aku pasti bisa
Menikmati semua dan menghadapinya
Aku yakin pasti bisa

Aku pasti bisa
Menikmati semua dan menghadapinya
Aku yakin pasti bisa

Aku ingin lepaskan seluruh bebanku
Dan ku jalani hidupku dengan senyuman

Aku pasti bisa
Menikmati semua dan menghadapinya
Aku yakin pasti bisa
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
The sun sets, keeping me company in my loneliness
Keep me company in this pain
I will survive
The sun sets, giving a new spirit to my soul
Giving a melodious chirp to my life
I will survive
I can definitely do it
Enjoy everything and face it
I am sure I can do it
I want to release all my burdens
And I live my life with a smile
